title: TrustForge Actions Library
description: Catalog of action definitions referenced by TF-0006 agent contracts.

actions_library_version.description: Version of the actions-library manifest schema itself.

ActionDef.description: Definition of a single named action.

name.description: Dotted action name this library defines.

default_risk.description: Default risk class when no policy overrides it.

default_proof.description: Default proof level when no policy overrides it.

approval_default.description: Default approval requirement when no policy overrides it.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the action does.

parameters.description: Parameters schema for the action (opaque JSON Schema fragment).

dangerous.description: Flagged as dangerous; policies SHOULD require explicit approval.

reversible.description: Whether the action can be undone by its inverse.
